original_problem: In a small town, there are three water towers - A, B, and C. Tower A is filled at a rate of 0.5 liters per minute, Tower B at 0.75 liters per minute, and Tower C at 0.25 liters per minute. If Tower A has a capacity of 3000 liters, Tower B has a capacity of 4500 liters, and Tower C has a capacity of 1500 liters, and all towers start filling simultaneously at 9:00 AM, what time will it be when all three towers are filled, given that Tower A starts with 1000 liters of water, Tower B starts with 1500 liters, and Tower C starts with 500 liters?
deconstructed_problem: In a small town, there are three water towers - A, B, and C. Tower A is filled at a rate of 0.5 liters per minute, Tower B at 0.75 liters per minute, and Tower C at 0.25 liters per minute. ଯଦି (if) Tower A has a capacity of 3000 liters, Tower B has a capacity of 4500 liters, and Tower C has a capacity of 1500 liters, and all towers start filling simultaneously at 9:00 AM, what time will it be when all three towers are filled, given that Tower A starts with 1000 liters of water, Tower B starts with 1500 liters, and Tower C starts with 500 liters?
original_steps: Step 1: Calculate the remaining capacity of each tower by subtracting the initial amount of water from the total capacity.
Step 2: Determine the time it takes to fill each tower by dividing the remaining capacity by the fill rate of each tower.
Step 3: Find the maximum time from Step 2, which will be the time when all towers are filled since they start filling simultaneously.
Step 4: Add the initial time of 9:00 AM to the maximum time found in Step 3 to get the final time.
Step 5: Convert the total minutes into hours and minutes for a readable time format.
skeleton_steps: ପଦକ୍ଷେପ (step) 1: Calculate the remaining capacity of each tower by subtracting the initial amount of water from the ମୋଟ (total) capacity.
ପଦକ୍ଷେପ (step) 2: Determine the time it takes to fill each tower by dividing the remaining capacity by the fill rate of each tower.
ପଦକ୍ଷେପ (step) 3: Find the maximum time from ପଦକ୍ଷେପ (step) 2, which will be the time when all towers are filled since they start filling simultaneously.
ପଦକ୍ଷେପ (step) 4: ଯୋଗ (add) the initial time of 9:00 AM to the maximum time found in ପଦକ୍ଷେପ (step) 3 to get the final time.
ପଦକ୍ଷେପ (step) 5: Convert the ମୋଟ (total) minutes into hours and minutes for a readable time format.
